Text.Page:
Troubling news, .

You might not be aware of it, but there is a single ghilliedhu from whom all ghilliedhus were created—and it exerts considerable influence over all of them. For the most part, it is benign, and cares little for the affairs of other races.

But we have learned that this ghilliedhu, Banyakas, has been corrupted by a powerful magic, in the form of a primeval stone, the Dominolith—which we believe originated from the same source as noctenium.

Travel to Banyakas's sanctum in Ghillieglade, and free him from the influence of the Dominolith, before the evil spreads through Banyakas to all the other ghilliedhus.
The forest thanks you, creature. We will remember this day long after you and your kind are gone.
